mapper.select: SELECT p.ZPDIPRJID AS project_id, p.ZPDIPRJNCODE AS project_code, p.ZPDIPRJNAME AS project_name, p.ZPDISTARTADRESS AS start_address, p.ZPDIENDADRESS AS end_address, COUNT(n.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID) AS node_count FROM dced_prj_prjinfo p LEFT JOIN dced_sys_version v ON v.ZPDIVERSIONID = ( SELECT v2.ZPDIVERSIONID FROM dced_sys_version v2 WHERE v2.ZPDIPARENTPROJECT = p.ZPDIPRJID ORDER BY v2.ZPDIVERLASTCHAGEDATE DESC, v2.ZPDICREATETIME DESC, v2.ZPDIVERSIONID DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN dced_prj_linenode n ON n.ZPDIPRJID = COALESCE(v.ZPDIVERSIONID, p.ZPDIPRJID) GROUP BY p.ZPDIPRJID, p.ZPDIPRJNCODE, p.ZPDIPRJNAME, p.ZPDISTARTADRESS, p.ZPDIENDADRESS ORDER BY p.ZPDIPRJNAME

SELECT p.ZPDIPRJID AS project_id, p.ZPDIPRJNCODE AS project_code, p.ZPDIPRJNAME AS project_name, p.ZPDISTARTADRESS AS start_address, p.ZPDIENDADRESS AS end_address, COUNT(n.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID) AS node_count FROM dced_prj_prjinfo p LEFT JOIN dced_sys_version v ON v.ZPDIVERSIONID = ( SELECT v2.ZPDIVERSIONID FROM dced_sys_version v2 WHERE v2.ZPDIPARENTPROJECT = p.ZPDIPRJID ORDER BY v2.ZPDIVERLASTCHAGEDATE DESC, v2.ZPDICREATETIME DESC, v2.ZPDIVERSIONID DESC LIMIT 1 ) LEFT JOIN dced_prj_linenode n ON n.ZPDIPRJID = COALESCE(v.ZPDIVERSIONID, p.ZPDIPRJID) WHERE p.ZPDIPRJID = #{projectId} GROUP BY p.ZPDIPRJID, p.ZPDIPRJNCODE, p.ZPDIPRJNAME, p.ZPDISTARTADRESS, p.ZPDIENDADRESS

SELECT #{projectId} AS project_id, n.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID AS node_id, n.ZPDITOWERNO AS tower_no, n.ZPDISTAKE AS stake, n.ZPDIORDER AS node_order, s.ZPDISURVERTYPE AS survey_type, e.ZPDITOWERTYPE AS tower_type, e.ZPDITOWERBODYID AS tower_body_id, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(e.ZPDIPOSHEIGHT), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(e.ZPDIPOSHEIGHT) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS pos_height, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(e.ZPDIPOSHEIGHTADJUST), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(e.ZPDIPOSHEIGHTADJUST) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS pos_height_adjust, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(e.ZPDILON), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(e.ZPDILON) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS lon, CASE WHEN REGEXP_LIKE(TRIM(e.ZPDILAT), '^-?[0-9]+(\\.[0-9]+)?$') THEN CAST(TRIM(e.ZPDILAT) AS DECIMAL(18, 6)) ELSE NULL END AS lat, CASE WHEN s.ZPDITIFFile IS NULL THEN FALSE ELSE TRUE END AS has_tif_blob FROM dced_prj_linenode n LEFT JOIN dced_prj_survey s ON s.ZPDILINENIODEID = n.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID LEFT JOIN dced_prj_electric e ON e.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID = n.ZPDIPRJLINENODEID WHERE n.ZPDIPRJID = COALESCE(( SELECT v.ZPDIVERSIONID FROM dced_sys_version v WHERE v.ZPDIPARENTPROJECT = #{projectId} ORDER BY v.ZPDIVERLASTCHAGEDATE DESC, v.ZPDICREATETIME DESC, v.ZPDIVERSIONID DESC LIMIT 1 ), #{projectId}) ORDER BY n.ZPDIORDER

SELECT COALESCE(MAX(ZPDIORDER), 0) FROM dced_prj_linenode WHERE ZPDIPRJID = COALESCE(( SELECT v.ZPDIVERSIONID FROM dced_sys_version v WHERE v.ZPDIPARENTPROJECT = #{projectId} ORDER BY v.ZPDIVERLASTCHAGEDATE DESC, v.ZPDICREATETIME DESC, v.ZPDIVERSIONID DESC LIMIT 1 ), #{projectId})
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dced_prj_prjinfo ( ZPDIPRJID, ZPDIPRJNCODE, ZPDIPRJNAME, ZPDISTARTADRESS, ZPDIENDADRESS ) VALUES ( #{projectId}, #{projectCode}, #{projectName}, #{startAddress}, #{endAddress} )
mapper.update: UPDATE dced_prj_prjinfo SET ZPDIPRJNCODE = #{projectCode}, ZPDIPRJNAME = #{projectName}, ZPDISTARTADRESS = #{startAddress}, ZPDIENDADRESS = #{endAddress} WHERE ZPDIPRJID = #{projectId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO dced_prj_linenode ( ZPDIPRJLINENODEID, ZPDIPRJID, ZPDITOWERNO, ZPDISTAKE, ZPDIORDER ) VALUES ( #{nodeId}, COALESCE(( SELECT latest_version_id FROM ( SELECT v.ZPDIVERSIONID AS latest_version_id FROM dced_sys_version v WHERE v.ZPDIPARENTPROJECT = #{projectId} ORDER BY v.ZPDIVERLASTCHAGEDATE DESC, v.ZPDICREATETIME DESC, v.ZPDIVERSIONID DESC LIMIT 1 ) latest_version ), #{projectId}), #{towerNo}, #{stake}, #{nodeOrder} )
